title: GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: GSEB Class 12 Result 2026 on the official website - gseb.org on 04-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the GSEB 12th Result 2026.

content.text: The Gujarat Board has published the GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 for Science, Arts, Commerce, and Vocational streams for the 2025-26 academic year in online mode. Students can access their Gujarat Board Class 12 result 2026 at gseb.org by logging in with their seat number and downloading the provisional marksheet for reference. The online scorecard is provisional, and students must collect the original marksheet from their respective schools later.

GSEB has activated the direct links to check the GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 for Science, Arts, Commerce, and Vocational streams on its official website. Students can visit the Gujarat Board result portal, enter their seat number, and instantly view or download their Class 12 result. Use the direct link given below to access your GSEB HSC result 2026 without any difficulty.

sections.heading: How to Download GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 Online

content.text: Students can follow the simple steps given below to check and download the GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 from the official website.

items: Visit the official website of Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board - gseb.org.
On the homepage, find and click on the link that reads "GSEB HSC Result 2026" or "GSEB 12th Result 2026".
A new result login page will open on the screen.
Enter your GSEB Class 12 seat number in the given field carefully.
Click on the "Submit" or "Go" button to proceed.
Your GSEB 12th HSC Result 2026 will be displayed on the screen with subject-wise marks and total score.
Download the online marksheet and take a printout for future reference until the original marksheet is issued by the school.
